message:
Extend Claude Code connector to support JSON format and test fixtures

Enhances ClaudeCodeConnector to handle both JSONL (streaming) and JSON
(project) formats, plus adds data_root override for deterministic testing.
This enables parsing of both .claude.json project files and .jsonl session
logs without code duplication.

Changes:

1. **data_root override** (consistent with other connectors):
   - Check ctx.data_root.exists() in scan() method
   - Use ctx.data_root when present (test mode), else projects_root() (production)
   - Enables isolated testing without ~/.claude/projects dependency

2. **Multi-format support**:
   - Extend file extension filter from just "jsonl" to ["jsonl", "json", "claude"]
   - This allows scanning:
     - session-XXXX.jsonl (streaming Claude Code sessions)
     - project.claude.json (newer Claude Code project format)
     - .claude files (alternative extension)

3. **Format-specific parsing**:

   **JSONL mode** (ext == "jsonl"):
   - Parse line-by-line as before (backward compatible)
   - Each line is a message object
   - Extract role, timestamp, content from each line
   - Build messages vector with idx = line number

   **JSON mode** (ext == "json" or "claude"):
   - Parse entire file as single JSON object
   - Extract messages array from root.messages field
   - Support both .messages[].content and .messages[].text
   - Same field mapping as JSONL but from array elements

4. **Title extraction refinement**:
   - JSONL: use first message first line (as before)
   - JSON: prioritize root.title field, fall back to first message
   - This handles .claude.json files with explicit title metadata

Field mapping (both formats):
- role: .role or .type → "user"/"assistant"/"agent"
- timestamp: .timestamp or .time → i64 milliseconds
- content: .content or .text → message body
- All other fields preserved in NormalizedMessage.extra

Rationale:
Claude Code has evolved to use different storage formats:
- Early versions: JSONL streaming logs
- Recent versions: .claude.json project files with messages array + metadata
- This change ensures both formats parse correctly

The JSON format enables richer metadata (titles, project IDs) that JSONL
can't express cleanly, while maintaining backward compatibility with existing
JSONL session logs.

The data_root override completes the test infrastructure pattern established
in commits cddcb2e (all connectors) and enables tests/connector_claude.rs to
validate parsing without system-wide Claude Code installation.

Testing impact:
- Existing JSONL parsing unchanged (backward compatible)
- New JSON parsing tested via tests/connector_claude.rs with
  tests/fixtures/claude_project/projectA/.claude.json
- data_root override enables isolated, deterministic connector tests

Edge cases handled:
- Empty messages array → conversation skipped (continues outer loop)
- Missing title in JSON → falls back to first message content
- Malformed JSON → serde_json returns Value::Null, messages.is_empty() check skips
- Mixed file extensions in same directory → all valid formats parsed

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
